title: 4 X 6 '' White Photo Frame With Glass Window Set Of 3,Oxford Garllery Picture Frame 6x4 Inch 3 Set, stylish 4x6 frames with a delicate Wooden grain texture For Wallmounted & Desk Top
features: *YiPinYin Set of 3 Garllery frame 6x4'' 3 Pack, Stylish Oxford photo frame 4x6'' Easy to Décor your home Office, Studio and Etc…,
*FRAME DESCRIPTION - A stylish photo frame for 10x15cm image with white delicate wooden grain texture.2.5cm Wooden Moudling Profile, Fitted with a high quality glass window.
*PHOTO SIZE - Display 6x4" image. When purchasing our frames please note that the size you are buying is the picture/photo size that will fit in the frame and not an overall size of the frame
*DISPLAY - Options to display on wall or as freestanding, Both Portrait or Landscape Display, Outside dimensions (in cm) L21 X W16 X H1.5cm
*Gift Packaging - YiPinYin(YPY) Picture Frames all 3 Pcs packed in Gift box,it is good Present for family or friends.
description: Product Description YiPinYin Gallery Picture Frames Gallery Photo frames for Wall and Desktops Our designs are simple, beautiful and durable. YiPinYin picture frames in variouis sizes and colors could perfectly match your decoration stand furniture. Choose our frames to display your valuable memories and decorate your favorite home, office or Studio, Restaurant and etc.... We supply white and black colors by size from 6 x 4'' Up to A3, they are pefferct for your photoes, poster, certificates or arts. YPY YiPinYin Gallery photo frames also come with mount or double mounts for size 6 x8'' up to A3, which is flexable for different size photoes. Hooks attached for all size Easy hang to wall. Display Portrait or landscape for different type of images When display on table it is also could be portrait or landscape Wallmounted Display for both Portrait or Landscap. YiPinYin Pictures frames for wallmounted and Desktop The Gallery Frames with hooks attached at back easy to hang to wall. Could Display both Portait or Landscap. The frames also can display on table by easel All size could hang to wall potrtrat or landscape. Size 14 x 11'' and A3 do not suggest to put on table. Part of 14 x 11'' and A3, all other sizes with easal could stand on table Gallery frames for Desktop display! YiPinYin Gallery photo frames for desktop display. size 6 x 4'', 5 x 7'', 6 x 8'', 8 x 10'', A4, has seasel at back, nice todisplay on table by verticaly or horizontaly. 6 x 6'', 8 x 8'', 10 x 10'' and 12 x 12'' also have easel could stand on tabletop. Hi Qaulity Materials, wooden texture at surface, Strong and Durable Hi Quality Materials, Wooden Texture finish Our frame made by hi quality MDF wood with texture foil. Glass front or perspex front. White mount with texture suface and beveld operture cutting. Picture Frames with Double Mounts YPY photo frames with mount it is flaxable for different size photoes. Part of size come with double mounts nice to fit 3 different size of photoes. Best Frame for Certificates and Poster A4 with mount for A5 11 x 14'' with double mounts for A4 or 5 x 7'' A3 with Double mounts for A4 and A5 It is the best frames to display your certifucates and also nice frames for different size poster. YiPinYin Black Gallery Frames We Provide Black and White color in variouis sizes, it is so eassy to have gallery wall in home, office, or any places ..... Currently Provide size as below: 6 x 4'' 5 x 7'' 6 x 8'' mount for 6 x 4'' 8 x 10'' mount 5x 7'' A4 mount A5(6 x 8'') 14 x 11'' Double Mounts for A4 or 5 x 7'' A3 with Double Mounts for A4 or A5(6 x 8'') Square Shape" 6 x 6'' frame mount 4 x 4'', 8 x 8'' frame with double mounts for 6 x 6'' and 4 x 4'', 10 x 10'' frame with double mounts for 5 x5'' & 8 x 8'', 12 x 12'' frame with double mounts for 10 x 10'' & 5 x 5''
